description.default: Site-admin authoring surface for the HB Central homepage Hero Banner. Hosted on the HBCentral Homepage-Admin page. Reads and writes the canonical Hero Banner Config list; invalidates the public cache on save. Provides typed draft editing, live preview against the production surface, dirty-state awareness with explicit discard guard, and read-after-write confirmation. Does not expose property-pane controls — the app itself is the authoring path.
